name: Interval

unions.name: Interval
cases: { min : EndPoint a, max : EndPoint a }

values.name: empty
values.comment: The interval containing no numbers (the empty set).

values.name: full
values.comment:
The interval containing all numbers (the set of extended reals).
-- Identity for `intersection`.

values.name: hull
values.comment:
The convex hull of two intervals. This is similar to union in that it includes all the points of the component intervals,
    and for non-overlapping intervals, the points inbetween them.
values.type: Interval comparable -> Interval comparable -> Interval comparable

values.name: intersection
values.comment: The intersection of two intervals. If the intervals overlap, this is the common part. If not, this is the empty interval.
values.type: Interval comparable -> Interval comparable -> Interval comparable

values.name: intervalToOrders
values.comment: Convert an interval to a list of restrictions.

values.name: map
values.comment: Map over the endpoints of the interval.

values.name: orderToInterval
values.comment: Convert a restriction to an interval.

values.name: ordersToIntervals
values.comment: Convert a list of restrictions to an interval.

name: Interval.EndPoint

unions.name: EndPoint
unions.comment: An endpoint, representing positive or negative infinity, or a finite value.

values.name: maxEndPoint
values.type: EndPoint comparable -> EndPoint comparable -> EndPoint comparable

values.name: minEndPoint
values.type: EndPoint comparable -> EndPoint comparable -> EndPoint comparable
